programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc: A three-day UFO festival takes place every year in a small town in Pennsylvania, attracting extraterrestrial civilization enthusiasts from all over America.This place is not accidental, because most reports of encounters with aliens are reported in this area.Although interest in UFOs appears to be waning in favor of technology and artificial intelligence threats, extraterrestrial enthusiasts remain active.They are organizing and writing petitions to the government asking for the disclosure of secret files.Although UFOs are most often associated with Roswell and Area 51, the center of this phenomenon is currently located in a provincial town near Pittsburgh and in Washington state.Marcin Prokop intends to meet with UFO enthusiasts and researchers to assess the evidence for the existence of cryptids and extraterrestrial civilizations.

programs.title: By truck across the United States
programs.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity to combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programs.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programs.desc: After a sudden increase in alarm calls in Morgan City, the city's mayor and police chief recruit a team of paranormal experts to investigate supernatural activity.

actor: Teen victim of yellow fever - Sophia Sluyter
